content: Daniel Finch: Fuckin’ hell, Cait, ain’t seen a woman like you around here before. You walkin’ around in that tight armor got every farmer’s cock harder than a brahmin’s skull. What’s a cage-fightin’ slut like you doin’ slummin’ it at Finch Farm? Cait: Hah! You farmers wouldn’t know what to do with a real woman if she shoved her tits in your face. I’ve fucked raiders who could out-plow your sorry ass. But MJR? That man could make a nun cream her panties just by cockin’ his pistol. Daniel Finch: Shit, sounds like you got it bad for him. Bet he’s got you bent over every raider corpse y’all leave behind. Me? I’d rather fuck Lucy Abernathy up against the corn silo, but Ma says she’s too good for me. Like there’s any “good” left in this hellhole. Cait: Oh, piss on that “good” shit.

Daniel Finch: Yeah, yeah, just another poor bastard stuck between raiders and his old man’s junk pile. You go enjoy your killer boyfriend—hope he doesn’t wake the whole farm when he pounds you later. Cait: Fuckin’ better wake the whole farm. Might teach you spineless settlers how a real man handles business. Now go jerk off to Lucy’s ghost or whatever sad shit you do at night.
